chapter_title.en: Chapter 66 – The fairness and the justice

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/350)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/350)
text: الْعَدْلُ أَحْلَى مِنَ الشَّهْدِ وَ أَلْيَنُ مِنَ الزُّبْدِ وَ أَطْيَبُ رِيحاً مِنَ الْمِسْكِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ibn Mahboub, from Muawiya Bin Wahab,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The justice is sweeter than the honey, and softer than the butter, and more aromatic than the musk’.
en.sarwar: 15. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from ibn Mahbub from Mu’awiyah ibn Wahab from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Justice is sweeter than honey, softer than butter and smells sweeter than musk.”
